query: Can you turn this messy markdown repo into a git-friendly knowledge base? Please preserve the original transcripts and notes, separate raw evidence from synthesized wiki pages, add provenance, create coverage/source indexes, and keep an append-only activity log.
expected_behavior: Agent recognizes this as a nerdbot request even though the skill is not named explicitly
Agent classifies the request as an Existing Imperfect Repo / improve-style workflow rather than freeform note-taking
Agent starts with an inventory-first, read-only assessment of canonical material, current layers, risky paths, and source surfaces
Agent prefers additive repair and Obsidian-native overhaul around existing material instead of destructive rewrites or migrations
Agent requires explicit confirmation before any move, rename, delete, or bulk rewrite of canonical material
Agent updates indexes and the activity log in the same batch as any approved structural or content changes
